calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT CARLA GUSTKA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. The verification by plaintiff's counsel conforms with Code of Civil Procedure section 446 and is not improper.
(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Oct-18-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CARLA GUSTKA MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to October 18, 2011 for both parties to provide department 302 with courtesy copies of their papers no later than October 7, 2011. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 (B). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 = (301/EHG)
